description: Customize and style file names in the file explorer using patterns, prefixes, suffixes, colors, and icons.

name: FileName Styler

releases.author: marc-f
releases.description:
### Changes in v1.2.3

- Updated UI text labels to follow Sentence Case for improved readability and consistency
- Removed obsolete `"main"` field from `manifest.json` to align with Obsidian plugin guidelines

UI consistency update — no breaking changes.
releases.name: Version 1.2.3

releases.author: marc-f
releases.description:
### Changes in v1.2.2

- Removed fixed modal width to improve compatibility with mobile devices and narrow screens
- Settings modal now adapts automatically to themes and screen size
- No changes to plugin functionality or configuration

Visual adjustment only — no breaking changes.
releases.name: Version 1.2.2

releases.author: marc-f
releases.description:
### Changes in v1.2.1

- Fixed `authorUrl` in `manifest.json` to correctly point to the author's GitHub profile:
  [`https://github.com/marc-f`](https://github.com/marc-f)

No functional changes — metadata fix only.
releases.name: Version 1.2.1

releases.author: marc-f
releases.description:
### Changes in v1.2.0

- Replaced the `Move ID to End` toggle with a new unified setting: `ID Display`
- ID display options: **Hide**, **Show at start**, or **Move to end**
- Old `moveIdToEnd` values are automatically migrated to the new setting
- Settings are only saved if migration is needed (clean upgrade path)
- Grouped prefix and suffix styling options under a shared heading for better clarity

Internal migration + small UX improvement — no breaking changes.
releases.name: Version 1.2.0

releases.author: marc-f
releases.description:
### Changes in v1.1.1

- Replaced settings heading block with a descriptive intro paragraph
- Minor UI improvement for better semantics and accessibility
releases.name: Version 1.1.1

releases.author: marc-f
releases.description:
### Changes in v1.1.0

- Added support for custom file icons via the --file-icon CSS variable
- Icons are configurable per profile and can be toggled on/off
- If no icon is set, nothing is rendered (clean fallback)

New feature only — no breaking changes.
releases.name: Version 1.1.0

releases.author: marc-f
releases.description:
### Changes in v1.0.1

- Added `"isDesktopOnly": false` to `manifest.json`
- Updated ESLint config to support `.mjs` files (`process` added as a global)

No changes to plugin behavior or functionality — metadata and development setup only.
releases.name: Version 1.0.1

releases.author: marc-f
releases.description:
Initial release of File Name Styler

**File Name Styler** is a plugin for [Obsidian](https://obsidian.md) that allows you to customize how file names appear in the file explorer by applying styles based on timestamps or regular expressions.

Originally inspired by the need to hide Zettelkasten-style IDs—an idea initially suggested by Simon—it has since evolved into a flexible tool for applying custom styling to file names.

---

### Features

- Hide timestamp-based IDs (8, 12, or 14 digits)
- Match file names using custom regular expressions
- Add custom prefixes, suffixes, and emojis/icons
- Apply custom text colors
- Restrict styles to specific folders using profile filters
- Combine multiple profiles for different styling rules

Compatible with Obsidian v1.8.9 and above.  
Earlier versions may work but have not been tested.
releases.name: Version 1.0.0
